title: Excalibur | Shulker Box Tooltip Support
description: Retexture of Shulker Box Tooltip in Excalibur style
body:
[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53bd9ada751157c5b2f5d749e2caa1176956530f.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excalibur-shulker-box-tooltip-support) [![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c71bb7f4433bdaf0acd433da49e7610cc9b8c59d.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-shulker-box-tooltip-support) ---
An **unofficial compatibility pack** designed to align the textures of [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) mod with the incredible [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack. This pack is **100% completed** and can be **customized** using the configuration menu: - **Disable Color Overlay** : `Configs → Colors → Colored Preview Window = No` - **Modify Color** : `Configs → Colors → Shulker Boxes = #RRGGBB` **Note:** - Require [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) to function. - For the best experience, use this pack alongside [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal). - For Feedback / Bug Report / Suggestion, please DM me on my **Discord (@thedatthai)**. **Credits:** - [Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/user/DTcBuGJU) - Creator of Excalibur - [MisterPeModder](https://modrinth.com/user/MisterPeModder) - Creator of Shulker Box Tooltip ## Showcase: ![Showcase (GUI)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c1635a1cd319e6f1def135659b085e5f1d501e1.png)
